title: AgentEval Conformance Fixture
description: Schema for AgentEval golden-trace conformance fixtures per architecture Decision-4 + ADR-005 fidelity-oracle contract. Validated by tests/conformance/loader.py:load_fixture().

latency_ms.description: Observed latency. Per ADR-005 L20: must be > 0 (strict-positive).
Per ADR-005 L20: allowable-variation lower bound; harness asserts observed latency_ms > this value. Strictly > 0 per ADR contract.

class_name.description: Python class name of the expected error, e.g., 'IncompleteTraceError'.

error_code.description: Machine-readable error_code per ADR-014 / FR50, e.g., 'INCOMPLETE_TRACE'.

message_contains.description: Optional substring assertion on the error message.

_schema_version.description: Semver MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH of the fixture schema; current 1.0.0. Phase-2 pre-release tags (e.g., 2.0.0-rc1) not supported — see deferred-work.md DF-1b.5-S1 for the full-semver regex migration.

adapter_name.description: Adapter identifier the fixture targets (matches directory name under fixtures/).

scenario_name.description: Scenario identifier within the adapter's fixture directory (matches filename without .json).

tool_calls.description: Observed ToolCallTrace records emitted by the adapter during the scenario run.

completeness.description: 3-state Literal per ADR-006 L15 + PRD FR36a L1553.

mcp_coverage.description: 3-state Literal per ADR-016 §Decision L24-28 + PRD FR36b L1554.

expected_tool_calls.description: Sequence of expected ToolCallTrace records with allowable-variation annotations per ADR-005 L19-22.

expected_errors.description: Structured error specs (class_name + error_code + optional message_contains) per Decision-4 contract + Story 1b.5 code-review H5 (Codex catch). Empty for non-error scenarios.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 date-time. Pattern enforced even without rfc3339-validator dep (jsonschema's format-checker only activates when rfc3339-validator or strict-rfc3339 is installed).

reproducibility_footer.description: Per FR39 — reproducibility audit fields captured when the golden fixture was recorded. Phase-1 fixtures use synthetic placeholder values (library_version='0.0.1' synced with pyproject.toml, redaction_policy_hash='sha256:placeholder') since no concrete adapter exists to record from; Epic 4 Story 4.1/4.2 will regenerate fixtures with real recorded values.
